_comment: Dea App bundle (v3.16.0), supabase_client mode — RESTRICTED: RLS scopes Dea to her own profile; non-maintainer self-write path (ingest/self_write.py). Build: python scripts/package_skill.py v3.16.0 --person config/dea_app.config.example.json --out healthspan-Dea-v3.16.0.skill
_secret_note: auth_email / auth_password / supabase_anon_key are read AT BUILD TIME from config/dea_app.secret.txt (gitignored), one per line as `auth_email=…`, `auth_password=…`, `supabase_anon_key=…`. The anon (publishable) key is RLS-gated and useless without a session, but is still injected per-bundle, not committed.
